title: CPC Project Configuration
description: Amstrad CPC project configuration for the amstrad-cpc-debug extension.

configuration.description: Hardware configuration name passed to Sugarbox via --cfg (e.g. CPC6128FR, CPC464UK, CPC+). Matches a .cfg file in Sugarbox's CONF/ directory.

type.description: How the emulator is loaded: disk image, snapshot, tape, cartridge ROM, or plain boot.

disk.description: Path to the disk A image (.dsk). Supports ${buildName}.

diskB.description: Path to the optional disk B image (.dsk).

tape.description: Path to the tape file (.cdt / .tzx / .wav). Supports ${buildName}.

snapshot.description: Path to the snapshot file (.sna). Supports ${buildName}.

cartridge.description: Path to the cartridge ROM (.cpr). CPC+ only.

symbolFile.description: Path to the RASM symbol file (.rasm) for label resolution in the debugger. Supports ${buildName}.

port.description: TCP port for the Sugarbox debug server.
